export const JOB_ICONS = {
  'Rune Knight': '⚔️',
  'Royal Guard': '🛡️',
  'Warlock': '🔮',
  'Sorcerer': '🌀',
  'Mechanic': '🔧',
  'Geneticist': '⚗️',
  'Arch Bishop': '✝️',
  'Sura': '👊',
  'Guillotine Cross': '🗡️',
  'Shadow Chaser': '🌑',
  'Ranger': '🏹',
  'Wanderer': '💃',
  'Minstrel': '🎵'
};

export const JOBS = Object.keys(JOB_ICONS);
export const ROLES = ['DPS', 'Support', 'Tank'];
